parameters.query:
SELECT json_build_object(
  'totals', (SELECT json_build_object(
    'last_24h_usd',  COALESCE(round(sum(cost_usd) FILTER (WHERE occurred_at > now() - INTERVAL '24 hours')::numeric, 4), 0),
    'last_7d_usd',   COALESCE(round(sum(cost_usd) FILTER (WHERE occurred_at > now() - INTERVAL '7 days')::numeric, 4), 0),
    'last_30d_usd',  COALESCE(round(sum(cost_usd) FILTER (WHERE occurred_at > now() - INTERVAL '30 days')::numeric, 4), 0),
    'calls_24h',     count(*) FILTER (WHERE occurred_at > now() - INTERVAL '24 hours'),
    'calls_7d',      count(*) FILTER (WHERE occurred_at > now() - INTERVAL '7 days'),
    'errors_24h',    count(*) FILTER (WHERE occurred_at > now() - INTERVAL '24 hours' AND status <> 'ok'),
    'avg_latency_24h', COALESCE(round(avg(latency_ms) FILTER (WHERE occurred_at > now() - INTERVAL '24 hours')::numeric, 0), 0)
  ) FROM llm_calls),
  'by_agent', (SELECT json_agg(t.* ORDER BY t.cost_usd_total DESC NULLS LAST) FROM llm_costs_summary t),
  'by_project_30d', (SELECT json_agg(t.* ORDER BY t.cost_usd_total DESC NULLS LAST) FROM (
    SELECT
      coalesce(p.name, '(sin proyecto)') AS project_name,
      coalesce(p.id::text, 'null') AS project_id,
      count(*) AS calls,
      round(sum(cost_usd)::numeric, 4) AS cost_usd_total
    FROM llm_calls l
    LEFT JOIN projects p ON p.id = l.project_id
    WHERE l.occurred_at > now() - INTERVAL '30 days'
    GROUP BY p.id, p.name
    LIMIT 15
  ) t),
  'by_model_30d', (SELECT json_agg(t.* ORDER BY t.cost_usd_total DESC NULLS LAST) FROM (
    SELECT model, count(*) AS calls, round(sum(cost_usd)::numeric, 4) AS cost_usd_total
    FROM llm_calls
    WHERE occurred_at > now() - INTERVAL '30 days'
    GROUP BY model
  ) t),
  'recent_errors', (SELECT json_agg(t.*) FROM (
    SELECT occurred_at, agent_name, project_id, model, status, LEFT(error_message, 100) AS error_preview
    FROM llm_calls
    WHERE status <> 'ok' AND occurred_at > now() - INTERVAL '7 days'
    ORDER BY occurred_at DESC LIMIT 15
  ) t)
) AS report;
